markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review company performance, product demos, and strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**ARR hits $13M:** The company's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) has reached $13M, a $2M increase in just over a month.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=3695.0)
  - [**New Retention Strategy:** A new strategy using customer health scores and ICP fit will prioritize delivery resources and proactively manage renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**Product Demos:** CheckDash (AI visibility) and the Content Inventory (Airtable replacement) were demoed, showcasing the platform's evolution into a fully integrated system.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [**Competitor Threat:** Homebase is leaving for Ahrefs, highlighting the need for stronger client relationships to uncover and counter competitive activity early.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline & Sales Update

  - [**New Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Read AI:** Series B ($50M) AI co-pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Viscom:** Series A industrial design platform.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**Hex:** Series C ($70M) data team platform (win influenced by a positive referral from Airbytes).](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**ICP Refinement:** Sales is now targeting more established companies, moving beyond simple blog-building clients.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Warriors Tickets:** A proven conversion tool; all prospects sent to a game have converted to customers.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)

### Customer Health & Retention Strategy

  - [**New Retention Framework:** A formal process will use two tools to prioritize delivery resources and improve renewal outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**1. Customer Health Scorecard:** Measures four vectors to provide a holistic view of account status:](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
          - [**Quality:** Client perception of work.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
          - [**Output:** Volume and timeliness of deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
          - [**Performance:** Achievement of client-specific results (e.g., organic traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
          - [**Relationship:** Strength of the client-side connection.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**2. ICP Fit Scoring:** Automatically scores clients on five dimensions to identify core partners.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Focus resources on high-fit clients and push back on custom requests from low-fit clients.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Recent Renewal Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Yorco:** Auto-renewing quarterly; goal is to convert to an annual contract.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Strappy:** Renewing flat; contract is being sent.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Discussing a custom website build and future strategy sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [**Client Exits & Learnings:**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**CodeRabbit:** Partnership ended at week 4.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
          - [**Reason:** Client was a poor ICP fit with misaligned expectations and a low-trust relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
          - [**Significance:** Demonstrates the new strategy's use in proactively ending engagements that are not set up for success.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**Homebase:** Partnership ends in December.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
          - [**Reason:** Bringing work in-house, but using Ahrefs for "their own thing."](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
          - [**Significance:** A competitor (Ahrefs) was engaging the client for nearly a year without the delivery team's knowledge, highlighting the need for stronger relationships to uncover such threats early.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

### Product & Platform Demos

  - [**Product Engineering Tracks:** The team is focused on five key areas:](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
      - [**Looker Exit:** Replacing Looker for internal reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [**Analytics Integration:** Integrating Google Analytics and Fathom (GDPR-compliant alternative) to track traffic and LLM visits.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [**Content Inventory:** Replacing Airtable with a new system for managing content, opportunities, and assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
      - [**CheckDash:** Launching the AI visibility product.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
      - [**Agentech Pipeline:** Rolling out new pipelines (approx. 5 per week).](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Output Framework:** Finishing the new workflow writing system for a full migration next week.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**CheckDash Demo (Marcel):**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
      - [**Goal:** Become the open standard for AI visibility, similar to SimilarWeb for traffic or G2 for products.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
      - [**Functionality:** Tracks AI visibility for specific buying categories by monitoring top prompts across sources like ChatGPT and Flexing.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
      - [**Model:** A public leaderboard shows rankings for common categories. Users get free access to these "category prompts" and can pay for custom prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [**Launch:** Internal launch of the public-facing site is planned for this week/next to begin indexing pages for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [**Content Inventory Demo (Brad & Daniel):**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
      - [**Goal:** Replace Airtable with an integrated system for managing content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
      - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2016.0)
          - [**Pages:** Crawls a site, scrapes content, and enriches it with AI-generated data (e.g., content score, technical issues).](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2111.0)
          - [**Opportunities:** Generates an "inbox" of ideas from the inventory, competitor analysis (via SEMrush), and trends (Reddit, LinkedIn).](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
          - [**Assignments:** Converts accepted opportunities into a linear, task-based dashboard for the delivery team, abstracting away pipeline complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
  - [**Technical Blog Demo (Daniel):**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)
      - [**Purpose:** The internal technical blog serves as a testing ground for the new platform, producing high-quality, structured content.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** The platform can generate complex, detailed articles (e.g., a 1.5-hour comparison of databases) and react to real-time events (e.g., Claude Haiku launch).](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
      - [**Pipeline Customization:** Users can modify inputs (e.g., outlines, writing guidelines) and rerun only specific steps without rerunning the entire research phase, which can be time-consuming.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Share the Vibe-coded link for requesting Warriors tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Marcel & Andi:** Launch mandatory weekly Atlas working sessions for the delivery team, starting this Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=3398.0)
  - [**Delivery Team:** Proactively build relationships with client stakeholders to gather feedback and uncover competitive activity early.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [**Product Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
      - [Launch the public-facing CheckDash site for indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
      - [Roll out the Content Inventory's "Pages" module.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=2016.0)
      - [Begin the full migration to the new Output Framework next week.](https://fathom.video/share/fjREsaVKFvSVLc34E1LaigV7Tbskinqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
